title: Progressive Dyspnea - Acute Decompensated Heart Failure
chief_complaint: Progressive shortness of breath over 3 months, now at rest, orthopnea, leg swelling

hidden_data.cxr: Cardiomegaly, bilateral pleural effusions, pulmonary congestion
hidden_data.echo: Severe LV systolic dysfunction, EF 25%, global hypokinesis

correct_diagnosis: Acute Decompensated Heart Failure with Reduced Ejection Fraction

patient_responses.meds: I stopped my water pill last week

hints.bnp_hint: Very high BNP suggests heart failure
